Variable.Name: ResetRTK
Variable.XLATE_FriendlyName: Reset RTK if a new Ntrip session starts

Object.Name: BatteryABelow
Object.XLATE_FriendlyName: Minimum charge level of Battery A

Object.Name: BatteryBBelow
Object.XLATE_FriendlyName: Minimum charge level of Battery B

Object.Name: OAFExpires
Object.XLATE_FriendlyName: Leased OAF is about to expire
